title: Can't find crate
explanation: This error occurs when the compiler cannot find a crate that your code references with `extern crate` or `use`. The crate might not be listed in Cargo.toml, or the name might be misspelled.
example_bad:
use serde::Serialize; // Error if serde is not in Cargo.toml

extern crate my_lib; // Error if crate doesn't exist

fixes.description: Check the crate name (hyphens become underscores)

tip: Crate names with hyphens in Cargo.toml become underscores in Rust code. For example, `serde-json` becomes `serde_json`.
